title: Will Netflix's 'Squid Game' Season 2 reach the #1 position on Netflix's Global Top 10 (Non-English TV) in its premiere week (week ending January 5, 2025)?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Squid Game Season 2 is reported by Netflix's Top 10 site (top10.netflix.com) as the #1 entry in the Global Non-English TV category for the weekly chart covering December 30, 2024 to January 5, 2025. Otherwise NO.
context_hint: Squid Game Season 1 (2021) was Netflix's most-watched series ever, with 1.65 billion hours viewed in its first 28 days. Season 2 is releasing globally on December 26, 2024. Significant marketing campaign throughout November-December 2024. Pre-release surveys show high anticipation. Trailer views exceeded 100 million in first 48 hours.
notes_for_evaluation: Market resolved YES. Squid Game Season 2 debuted at #1 globally on Netflix's Top 10 in premiere week with 68 million views in first 4 days, breaking debut records.
